one_liner: AMZN at $247 is below the upper Bollinger Band ($250.83) after a strong run from $232 support, with earnings July 30 as the next catalyst — the DCF model shows overvaluation but Parkev's $299 target remains the contrarian bull case.

price_action.vol_rank: Below average — volume declining as price reaches upper Bollinger Band
price_action.intraday_story: AMZN gapped up from prior close, ran to $247.50 (near the upper BB at $250.83), and closed at $247.04. Volume declining as price approaches resistance is a cautionary flag for near-term continuation.

news_catalyst.headline: Amazon Pushing New Shipping Initiative — Threat to UPS and FedEx
news_catalyst.summary: Amazon announced a new shipping push expanding its own logistics network, pressuring UPS and FedEx but beneficial for Amazon's cost structure. Combined with the $25B bond raise announced July 9 (for AI data centers), Amazon is in aggressive investment mode. The $25B raise is bullish (lowers WACC per Parkev's analysis) but also flags that FCF will be negative in 2026 (-$10B estimated). July 30 earnings will be the key data point.

technical.summary: AMZN is above EMA50 ($239.20) and EMA200 ($238.34) — healthy structure. RSI 59.7 approaching overbought zone. Upper BB at $250.83 is the near-term resistance. Wyckoff support at $232.23, resistance at $276.13. The backend DCF shows overvaluation at $55 but Parkev's model gives $299 — significant model divergence. Watch at current levels, accumulate on pullback to $239 EMA50.
technical.wyckoff_narrative: Above both EMAs with neutral Wyckoff bias. Price approaching upper BB on declining volume — watch for rejection or break. July 30 earnings is the next major signal.

valuation.summary: Backend DCF shows $55 (significantly undervalued assumptions likely overstating growth or discount rate). Parkev's independent model shows $299. The truth is likely between the two — watch rather than accumulate at $247 near upper BB.

key_strengths: Logistics network expansion improving delivery economics
key_concerns: FCF turning negative in 2026 (-$10B estimated) due to AI capex
Earnings July 30 — capex guidance update will be closely watched
fundamentals.summary: Grade B (0.77). Strong business quality but capex-driven FCF pressure and approaching upper BB argue for caution at current levels.

risks: Upper BB at $250.83 is near-term resistance — watch for rejection on declining volume
FCF negative in 2026 — earnings guidance on capex spend will be the key variable July 30
